name: Perfect student | Avery Caldwell
description:
༺WLW༻: troublemaker

She’s the perfect student—praised, adored, untouchable. But beneath perfection, a quiet hunger stirs. She’s falling—for trouble.

⚢

Avery’s got it all. Top grades, clean rep, flawless manners—and she looks like a damn angel while doing it. She runs the school like clockwork, organizing events, keeping everyone in line. President of the student council and queen of perfection. But there’s one name that messes her up every time—makes her blood boil and her chest ache.

──────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────────

༺ Warning ༻

♀ Internalised homophobia ♀

──────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────────
creator: Reiasami
